prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13442名、2026年大幅扩招27.2%（位次下移压力）、软科排名提升与抖音高热（位次上移压力）、湖北省考生小幅增加及优势学科社会热度偏低等多因素，扩招效应占主导但被其他因素部分抵消；预测2026年物理类最低位次约15333名，区间14833–15833名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 14812 → 15251 → 14316 → 14116 → 13442, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers) over the past 3 years. In 2025, the ranking moved forward by about 674 places compared to 2024, indicating increasing popularity year by year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13442. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Hubei Province: 78 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 85 in 2024, and 81 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 103 students, an increase of 22 students (about 27.2%) compared to 2025, which notably increases admission opportunities and exerts downward pressure on rankings (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily improved in recent years: 2021: 62nd → 2022: 64th → 2023: 64th → 2024: 68th → 2025: 63rd → 2026: 57th, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (due to a teacher ethics investigation incident). No significant negative public opinion occurred in 2025–2026. On Douyin, the university ranks 7th overall (high popularity), with video content mainly focusing on 'high cost-performance 211' and 'chemical engineering heritage', attracting high social attention, which may boost application popularity. No obvious admission gaps or breaks have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Chemistry (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting strong capabilities in chemical engineering. However, these disciplines belong to the 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' category, which has low social popularity (clearly discouraging), potentially suppressing some candidates' willingness to apply.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The university offers popular majors like Computer Science and Automation, which have some appeal. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700 (slightly increased from about 391,200 in 2025), with an estimated 251,400 in the Physics Category (an increase of about 1,600 from 249,800 in 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal to candidates from Hubei Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 13442, the significant 27.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 (downward pressure on rankings), the improvement in Soft Science ranking and high Douyin popularity (upward pressure on rankings), the slight increase in Hubei candidates, and the low social popularity of advantageous disciplines, the expansion effect dominates but is partially offset by other factors. The predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 15333, with a range of 14833–15833.

- Computer Science (Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology)
- Automation (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management)
- Chemistry (Basic Top-Notch).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials; Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Green Chemical Engineering and Biomedicine)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry; Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry)
- Bioengineering (Bioengineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category sees a significant enrollment expansion of about 27%, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 15333, ranging from 14833 to 15833. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (14833) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Hongde Academy and Computer Science. Those with rankings in the middle range (around 15333) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 dual-degree programs. Candidates near the upper limit (15833) should consider Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Classes as safety options. Note that the university's advantageous disciplines are mostly in chemical engineering and materials (with low social popularity), but popular majors like Computer Science and Automation still face intense competition.
